chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1190 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 16122/2024 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No. 5365/2022 4. For hearing of main case 06.08.2025 This is an old case of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was lastly taken up on 14.02.2023, which is over 02 years ago, since then learned counsel for the petitioners has made no efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation. We note from the file that the petitioners have filed an application bearing CMA No. 16122/2024 to withdraw this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with all listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
